runTitle: Production AI Feedback Trace Links E2E - Direct Trace URLs Returned
coveredSurfaces: /api/ai/feedback proxy returns traceId + langfuseStatus=success + traceApiUrl + dashboardUrl + monitoringLookupUrl
skippedSurfaces: Langfuse trace UI deep link via htmlPath/traceUrl

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI sidebar free-text query 이후 negative feedback click까지 수행했고 브라우저 캡처 기준 /api/ai/feedback 응답이 traceId, langfuseStatus=success, traceApiUrl, dashboardUrl, monitoringLookupUrl를 모두 반환했다.
같은 피드백 응답에서 monitoringLookupUrl이 Cloud Run direct host의 https URL로 반환되는 것을 확인했다. sampled /monitoring/traces 검색 상관관계는 direct trace link 증거와 분리해 본 run 범위에서 제외했다.

completedImprovements.title: Feedback API direct trace links exposed for operator follow-up
completedImprovements.evidence: Production /api/ai/feedback response for traceId cc7309c453c6951a23ce55ff11bd9f08 returned traceApiUrl, dashboardUrl, and https monitoringLookupUrl.
completedImprovements.note: Direct trace links are now the primary observability evidence for feedback QA; sampled monitoring search remains secondary.

notes: Browser-captured POST /api/ai/feedback body included traceId cc7309c453c6951a23ce55ff11bd9f08 for negative feedback on production.
Response status was 200 with langfuseStatus=success and direct trace links present.
monitoringLookupUrl was returned as https://ai-engine-490817238363.asia-northeast1.run.app/... after the forwarded-host/proto fix.
This run treats direct trace links as primary evidence and does not block on same-run sampling visibility in /monitoring/traces?q=<traceId>.

links.label: Cloud Run monitoring lookup for feedback traceId
